venues.name: de Young Museum
venues.address: 50 Hagiwara Tea Garden Dr, San Francisco, CA 94118

current_exhibitions.title: About Place: Bay Area Artists from the Svane Gift
current_exhibitions.description: Works by Bay Area artists drawn from a recent major gift to the de Young collection, exploring themes of place and belonging in the region.

current_exhibitions.title: Nengi Omuku: The Gathering
current_exhibitions.description: Large-scale paintings by Nigerian artist Nengi Omuku depicting communal gathering and the beauty of collective experience through luminous, layered surfaces.

events.title: Free Saturday — Bay Area Residents
events.description: Free general admission every Saturday for residents of the nine Bay Area counties. Show Bay Area ID at the door. Docent tours at 11:30 AM and 1:30 PM.

events.title: Free Saturday — Bay Area Residents
events.description: Free general admission every Saturday for residents of the nine Bay Area counties.

current_exhibitions.title: Ongoing Collection — European Masters
current_exhibitions.description: Encyclopedic collection of European art spanning 4,000 years including Rodin sculpture, Impressionist paintings, and ancient Mediterranean works. The building itself — a replica of the Palais de la Légion d'Honneur — is part of the experience.

events.title: Docent Tour
events.description: Guided docent tour of the collection. Runs Tuesday–Sunday at 12:30 PM. Included with membership or general admission.

events.title: Docent Tour
events.description: Guided docent tour. Runs Tue–Sun at 12:30 PM.
